name: custom-reviewer
description: Multi-perspective code reviews, reviewable plan drafting, and plan reviews with pluggable contexts and synthesized verdicts.

interface.longDescription: Custom Reviewer provides reusable skills for diff-anchored code reviews, reviewable plan drafting, plan reviews, and review loops using specialist contexts plus a shared synthesis pass.
defaultPrompt: Check this diff for architecture risks.
Run a review loop on my working tree.
